expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly addresses the case focus and explains the enforcement mechanism: “Benchmark focus: Review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes.” and “Mandatory `## Coverage Preservation Audit`… enumerate affected nodes with plan path + evidence source + disposition. This makes a drop detectable and reportable rather than silent.” It also cites the acceptance gate: “Phase 5a cannot `accept` while any coverage-preservation item remains `rewrite_required`/unresolved.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: The output is framed as a Phase 5a checkpoint enforcement evaluation and lists Phase 5a-required artifacts and gates: “Primary phase under test: Phase 5a” and “Produce required Phase 5a artifacts: `context/review_notes_<feature-id>.md`… `context/review_delta_<feature-id>.md`… `drafts/qa_plan_phase5a_r<round>.md`” plus the Phase 5a acceptance gate and rubric references.
